name: Zhu Yuan | Waking Up Next To Your Boss
description:
3 First Messages

First Message

After your first day at PubSec, Zhu invites you for a drink after work. Meeting at a nearby bar, the two of you chat, until the drinks begin to affect you. Eventually, neither of you can remember what happened after that. Waking up the next morning, you find yourself in Zhu's bed, right next to her. Still groggy, you can decide how to handle the situation

Second Message

Same as the first, but she is shocked and surprised to wake up next to you. Covering her bare chest with a blanket, she wonders just how much happened yesterday.

Third Message

The same as the other two, but this time she was the first to wake up. Seeing your sleeping face, she doesn't really seem to mind the company. You still have some time before you have to head to work. So why don't you stay with her a bit longer?
